title: intl-ai config
description: Configuration for intl-ai translation build step

defaultLocale.description: Source locale used as the basis for translation (e.g. 'en')

locales.description: All locales to produce, including the defaultLocale

provider.description: Provider ID (e.g. 'openai', 'anthropic') or custom provider ID

model.description: Model name passed to the provider (e.g. gpt-4o-mini)

apiKey.description: API key for the model provider

baseURL.description: OpenAI-compatible chat completions endpoint base URL

glossary.description: Per-domain translations that should always be used as-is

maxRetries.description: Max retry attempts for failed translations

processor.description: Predefined token processor for syntax validation

modelParams.description: Additional parameters passed to the provider (e.g. max_tokens, extra_body)
